_INSTRUCTIONS: Merge this fragment into ~/.claude/settings.json under the top-level 'hooks' key. The 'Stop', 'Notification', and 'SessionStart' entries each merge under their respective top-level keys. Where the user already has hooks for an event (e.g. notify-tts.sh under Notification), append to the existing hooks[] array. Replace $HOME with your actual home path — Claude Code does NOT expand env vars in the command string. Remove this _INSTRUCTIONS field after merging. NOTE: orch-goal-stop-account.sh has been removed from Stop hooks as of orch#64. Token accounting is now handled by orch-goal-stop-account-daemon, which is launched automatically by orch-goal-pursue and works across all harnesses.
